source_label: Wiktionary ‚ÄĒ melange: /m…ôňąl…Ďn í/, /me…™-/, /-ňąl…Ďnd í/ (corroborated by Dictionary.com: [mey-lahnzh, -lahnj])
notes: melange is Chainguard's declarative apk build tool; paired with apko it builds Wolfi-based low-CVE container images without a Dockerfile. The name is the French word m√©lange ("mixture"), so the final -ange is a soft "zh" like rouge or measure, and the stress falls on the second syllable: may-LAHNZH, not "MEL-anj". The anglicized may-LAHNJ is a listed dictionary variant, but the zh-form is the standard one.
